title: Foxcraft Modpack
description: The official Modpack for the mcfoxcraft.de Server.
body:
# Official Foxcraft Modpack 
This is a Modpack with optimization Mods and other QoL Mods that are supported and recommended for the use with the [Foxcraft Server](https://mcfoxcraft.de)

## External Resources
### Mods
> The following Mods are (currently) not available on Modrinth but will still be delivered via this Modpack. Either the copyright owner explicitly allowed it or they are distributed under a license which allows to distribute it on here.
- [Clientizen](https://github.com/DenizenScript/Clientizen)ᵇᵉᵗᵃ
  - License: [MIT](https://github.com/DenizenScript/Clientizen?tab=MIT-1-ov-file#readme)
### Resourcepacks
> The following Resourcepacks are (currently) not available on Modrinth but will still be delivered via this Modpack. Either the copyright owner explicitly allowed it or they are distributed under a license which allows to distribute it on here.

- [Torrezx-Fox Effects](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/fox-effects/)
- [Torrezx-Fox paintings !](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/fox-paintings/)
- [Torrezx-Better boss bar](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/torrezx-better-boss-bar)

_The use of the Torrezx-Resources has been explicitly allowed by the copyright holder._\
[**PROOF**](https://static.spikey.biz/yourls/d00a94e26beb.png)

## Support
If any problems occur with the modpack (whithout changing the configuration), you can submit your Problem via [Discord](https://spikey.biz/discord).
